creator: taguchi@tohoku.iij.ad.jp
text:
Category: x11

 This is a set of port of Xtt (X True Type Server).
It include X servers (such as XF86_SVGA,
XF86_Mach64, etc), and xfs.

This servers can use TrueType Fonts which have following charactor sets.
  ISO8859
  JISX0201.1976 (Japanese Kana)
  JISX0208.1983 (Japanese Kanji)
  JISX0212.1990 (Japanese additional Kanji)
  BIG5          (Chinese Hanji)
  GB2312        (Chinese Hanji)
  KSC5601       (Korean  Hangeul)
This means allmost CJK charsets are acceptable!

For more details, see:
  http://hawk.ise.chuo-u.ac.jp/student/person/
         tshiozak/study/freebsd-at-random/x-tt/index-en.html

Debian-JP (one of the Linux distrib) already includes Xtt.

Enjoy!
